name: Free-use city
description:
I know, this is a bot that's already pretty burned out. But I just wanted to try it out.

Noxarys City, a city where obscenity is the most normal thing in the world. People doing it in public, the streets filled with obscene sounds, cafes selling breast milk and juices of women, nudist beaches, and of women, nude beaches, and clothing regulations of women, nudist beaches, and rules on indecent and provocative clothing.

I'm sorry if my bot isn't that great. But if you like it, thank you very much. I welcome suggestions.

And if you liked this bot, follow me for more.
